meaning: n.国际象棋的棋子,起草人
examples: The draughtsman rapidly blocked in his idea .
Was a Spanish painter, draughtsman, and sculptor.
Hamilton became a draughtsman at an engineering company.
Mr Beck worked with London Transport as an engineering draughtsman before he designed the map.
The phrase became a battle cry for modernists such as his one-time draughtsman, Frank Lloyd Wright.
